## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `cd frontend && pnpm build` passes (if frontend changes)
- [ ] i18n strings added to both `en/` and `zh/` (if UI text changed)
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
